name: blueconic-mcp
description: Connect Claude to your BlueConic CDP and explore tenant data through dynamically generated MCP tools.
long_description: BlueConic MCP runs locally, loads your tenant's OpenAPI specification at startup, and exposes BlueConic's read-only GET endpoints as MCP tools. The same codebase also works with Cursor, VS Code, and other stdio-based MCP clients.

tenant_url.title: BlueConic Tenant URL
tenant_url.description: Your BlueConic tenant URL, for example https://your-tenant.blueconic.net

client_id.title: OAuth Client ID
client_id.description: Client ID from BlueConic Settings > Access management > Applications

client_secret.title: OAuth Client Secret
client_secret.description: Client secret from BlueConic Settings > Access management > Applications
